# Support

Need help with ASFNotify?

1. **Read the [README](../README.md)** — it covers installation, full configuration, backend setup (ntfy / Gotify / Apprise → Discord, email, …), the `notifytest` command, troubleshooting, and an FAQ.
2. **Search existing [issues](https://github.com/Bladeage/asf-notify/issues)** — your question may already be answered.
3. **Open a new [issue](https://github.com/Bladeage/asf-notify/issues/new)** for bugs or questions. Include your ASF + ASFNotify version, the backend you use, and the relevant log lines (redact tokens).

Please note ASFNotify is an independent, third-party plugin — for **ArchiSteamFarm** itself, use [ASF's own support channels](https://github.com/JustArchiNET/ArchiSteamFarm/blob/main/.github/SUPPORT.md).
